builderCode:
TARGET_ROW, TARGET_COL, TARGET_SIZE = 2, 6, 3

target = Rect()
target.position = (TARGET_ROW, TARGET_COL)
target.width = TARGET_SIZE
target.height = TARGET_SIZE
target.color = (180, 180, 180)

class DragSquare(Rect):

    def on_drag(self, position: tuple[int, int], drag_type: str):
        self.position = position
        if drag_type == 'start':
            target.color = (255, 220, 0)
        elif drag_type == 'end':
            target.color = (180, 180, 180)
        else:
            row, col = position
            inside = (
                TARGET_ROW <= row < TARGET_ROW + TARGET_SIZE and
                TARGET_COL <= col < TARGET_COL + TARGET_SIZE
            )
            target.color = (34, 197, 94) if inside else (251, 146, 60)

small = DragSquare()
small.position = (2, 2)
small.color = (99, 102, 241)
small.animate = False  # snap to cursor cell; no slide animation
